title: Tâi-gí Telex Keyboard
subtitle: Type {mode} with Tâi-gí Telex input method

input.label: Try it out:
input.placeholder: Type here... (e.g., tai[d] → tâi, tâi[f] → tâi-)

howItWorks.title: How Taiwanese Telex Works
howItWorks.description: This input method uses Vietnamese Telex-style mechanism to type Taiwanese romanization tones. Tonal marks can be placed either right after the vowel or at the end of each syllable.
howItWorks.additionalKeysDescription: Since these letters would go unused otherwise, I've repurposed them for additional functions.
